title: This “UFO” ETF Is Among the Few Real Ways To Invest In The Space Economy
summary: If you have ever tried to buy “space exposure” through an ETF, you have probably noticed the same trick. Most space funds quietly fill the bucket with Boeing (NYSE:BA), Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT), and Honeywell (NASDAQ:HON), then call it a day. title: Lockheed Martin HIMARS Deal Highlights Undervalued Stock And Defense Focus
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) has secured a major contract to deliver HIMARS rocket launchers to the U.S. Army and allied nations. The agreement covers multiple countries and highlights continued demand for precision rocket artillery systems. The deal adds to the company’s Missiles and Fire Control segment at a time of shifting global defense priorities toward Russia and China. For investors watching NYSE:LMT, this HIMARS contract coincides with the stock trading around $512.41, after a 3.1%...

title: The Pentagon Has Released UFO Files to the Public. What Caught Our Attention.
summary: Under the direction of President Donald Trump, the Pentagon on Friday released dozens of files totaling thousands of pages about “Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena.”  Investors, however, may be thinking about them as unidentified flying objects, or UFOs.  The first interesting tidbit was about an aircraft that in 2023 made “multiple 90-degree turns at an estimated 80 mph.” That is indicative of potentially impressive technology in propulsion, control, and materials science that would interest investors looking at jet and jet engine makers, such as Lockheed Martin and GE Aerospace.

title: Forget About the Iran War. Threats from Russia and China Just Won Lockheed Martin a $1.1 Billion HIMARS Contract.
summary: Defense sales are booming in regions far away from the Middle East.
